Infra.description: Core GPU cloud infrastructure: SKUs, regions, data residency, networking, capacity/reservations

CKS.description: CoreWeave Kubernetes Service: managed K8s control plane and cluster behavior

Platform.description: Application platform layer: multi-tenant, IAM, automation, tooling

W&B.description: Weights & Biases product or W&B-managed services

tiebreak_rules: Pick the area reflecting the primary pain/blocker
If still unclear, pick the area that owns the fix in today's org
Last resort: use tiebreak_priority ordering (Infra > CKS > Platform > AI Services > W&B)

inference_routing.self_managed_on_cks: CKS (and AI Services > Inference if unit is service)

insight_categories.name: Issues
insight_categories.description: Bugs, incidents, broken behavior in existing product

insight_categories.name: Null
insight_categories.description: Relationship/strategy context only, no concrete product requirement

insight_categories.name: Product Fit / Scope
insight_categories.description: Are we the right solution at all?

insight_categories.name: Success Pattern / Win Signal
insight_categories.description: Repeatable success pattern or positive validation
